# Summit Guest-Experts | What Each One Builds

<callout icon="🎤" color="blue_bg">
	**SUMMIT GUEST-EXPERTS** | For the 3 experts building agents live | Wed Jul 8, 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT | Grounded in Alex's brief
</callout>

## The Big Picture (Alex's brief)

<callout icon="💡" color="blue_bg">
	The 15-day challenge taught members to build their first AI marketing agent, one that gives them a fresh content idea and a ready-to-run prompt every day. At the Summit you show them what is possible next. In Alex's words: *"bring 3 experts who know how to build agents, someone builds a research agent, someone builds an image-gen agent."* Each of you builds one different agent live, so members leave thinking "I can build that too."
</callout>

## Who Is in the Room

<callout icon="👥" color="gray_bg">
	Hundreds of NAS.com members who just built their first AI marketing agent over 15 days. Beginners to intermediate. They can use Claude Projects. They are not developers. Keep it accessible: build live, narrate every step, no code, no jargon.
</callout>

## The 3 Agents (one each)

<callout icon="🔎" color="blue_bg">
	**Expert 1: The Research Agent**
	**What you build:** an agent that does daily marketing research for a business, finds what competitors are posting, spots trending topics, and surfaces content ideas, automatically.
	*Alex:* "find out what your competitors are doing, how do you find social media trends using AI, what's relevant today?"
	**The promise:** "Never wonder what is working in your market again."
</callout>

<callout icon="🎨" color="purple_bg">
	**Expert 2: The Image-Gen Agent**
	**What you build:** an agent that turns a content idea into ready-to-post visuals for a business, on-brand images, no designer.
	*Alex:* "someone's going to build an image-gen agent."
	**The promise:** "Make the picture, not just the words, without a designer."
</callout>

<callout icon="🧲" color="green_bg">
	**Expert 3: The Customer-Finder (Outreach) Agent**
	**What you build:** an agent that finds potential customers or people to promote the product, surfacing relevant conversations and leads on Reddit, X, or communities.
	*Alex (July theme):* "find people to promote your product, affiliates, UGC, find potential customers, market without spending money."
	**The promise:** "Find customers without paying for ads."
</callout>

> Each agent should be one clear, repeatable workflow a beginner could rebuild the next day. Depth over flash.

## Your Slot and Format

<table fit-page-width="true" header-row="true">
<tr color="blue_bg">
<td>Field</td>
<td>Detail</td>
</tr>
<tr><td>When</td><td>Wed Jul 8, your 35-minute window inside 11:00pm to 2:00am SGT (exact time confirmed by the team)</td></tr>
<tr><td>How</td><td>Built live on screen-share. Narrate as you build. No slides needed.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Tool</td><td>Claude (Projects), the house tool the audience knows. One extra accessible tool is fine if your agent needs it.</td></tr>
<tr><td>Recorded</td><td>Yes (for replay)</td></tr>
<tr><td>Your goal</td><td>The audience leaves able to picture rebuilding your agent themselves.</td></tr>
</table>

## What to Prepare

<callout icon="✅" color="green_bg">
	- Your agent pre-built and working, so you rebuild a clean version live (do not start from a blank page cold).
	- A real example business to build it for (or use the challenge's running example, ask the team).
	- Pitch to a beginner audience who just finished their first 15-day agent build.
</callout>

## Guest-Expert FAQ

<details color="gray_bg">
<summary>The questions you will have</summary>
	- **Live or pre-recorded?** Live screen-share. Recorded for replay.
	- **How long is my part?** About 35 minutes, inside the 3-hour Summit.
	- **Do I need slides?** No, it is a live build. Minimal text only.
	- **How technical is the audience?** Beginners who just built their first Claude agent. No code, no jargon.
	- **What tool should I use?** Claude (Projects) ideally; one extra accessible or free tool is fine.
	- **Can I mention my own product or brand?** [ team to confirm, a brief intro is welcome, no hard pitch ].
	- **When do I show up?** Green room 30 to 45 min early for a tech and screen-share check.
	- **What if my agent breaks live?** Have the pre-built working version ready to fall back to; the host (Matt) will cover.
	- **What is my fee or comp?** [ confirm with Danny or Alex ].
	- **Who do I contact on the day?** [ team to add: name and number ], and Cholo runs tech.
</details>
